Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-09-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Paul K. Lee, Esq. for Plaintiff: Silverview Terrace Homeowners Assoc.
Plaintiff's witness: Kristie Kelly, was sworn and examined.
Exhibit 1---CC&R---------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Accounting---------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Willie F. Lassiter.
Proposed Judgment received in court, matter is submitted and taken under submission.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the exhibits in open court.

May 6, 2005
Judgment granted as follows:
Principal $1,520.29
Attorney's Fees $720.00
Costs $948.30 for a total of $3,188.59 and Judgment for sale of the real property commonly known as 160 Bayview Circle, San Francisco, see scanned doc for details.
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2005 Continued To Jun-10-05 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
